Metadata.Goal: 让 domain-ai-logic 从显式宿主 + re-export 收口，推进为第一批真实 AI runtime glue 实现宿主。

TaskSpace.name: refactor-domain-ai-logic-host-implementation-cutover
TaskSpace.Description: 推进 domain-ai-logic 成为第一批真实实现宿主

TaskGroup.name: Ownership Freeze
TaskGroup.Description: 冻结第一批迁移到 domain-ai-logic 的正式实现边界。

Task.name: 定义第一批 domain-ai-logic 实现 ownership 表
Task.Description: 明确哪些 host-facing AI runtime glue 迁入 domain-ai-logic，哪些仍留在 core-logic / organ-logic。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 未把 platform primitive 误迁入 AI host

TaskGroup.name: Implementation Cutover
TaskGroup.Description: 让 domain-ai-logic 承接第一批真实实现。

Task.name: 迁移第一批 host-facing glue 到 domain-ai-logic
Task.Description: 把 shell runtime facade、runtime coordinator glue、host-facing orchestration bridge 的第一批正式实现放入 domain-ai-logic。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: formal consumer host 保持不变

TaskGroup.name: Focused Verification
TaskGroup.Description: 验证真实宿主 cutover 不回归。

Task.name: 补充并运行 domain-ai host ownership guards
Task.Description: 通过 focused tests 锁定 domain-ai-logic 不再只是 forwarding shell，且现有 consumer adoption 稳定。
